scope: Defines the upstream classification bridge for post-delist coverage-gap rows. The bridge standardizes terminal-event evidence earlier in the execution path, but it does not price exits and it does not relax any portfolio hard-blocker rule.

all_of: a delist terminal_event exists for the same instrument with signal_date <= terminal_event_date <= planned_exit_date
there is at least one later trading-calendar date after planned_exit_date
vw_tradability_daily has zero rows for the instrument on dates after planned_exit_date
vw_bars_daily has zero rows for the instrument on dates after planned_exit_date

prohibited_actions: Filter unresolved rows and continue portfolio
Resolve the blocker at portfolio layer
notes: This bridge is classification-only. It upgrades hidden terminal-event evidence into an explicit terminal_event_unpriced blocker.
The bridge marker terminal_event_bridge_required is an audit breadcrumb, not a pricing result.
Any later unblock still requires a formal terminal pricing layer upstream.
